meaning: n.[生]粒细胞,粒性白细胞(细胞质中含有颗粒的一类白细胞)
examples: The lymphocyte of spleen had decreased, and the heterophilic granulocyte had increased, there was more tumour cell infiltrating.
A large cell of the bone marrow that is a precursor of the mature granulocyte of the blood.
Objective: to explore the change of serum granulocyte colony stimulating factor (g CSF) in critical patients.
